661.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that they used to greet the Prophet ﷺ while he was in prayer: 'Peace be upon Jibril, peace be upon Mika'il, peace be upon Israfil, peace be upon so-and-so and so-and-so.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ turned to them and said: 'Indeed Allah is the Peace (al-Salam). When one of you prays, let him say: Al-tahiyyatu lillahi was-salawatu wat-tayyibat...' (the tashahud).
661.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa mereka dulu mengucapkan salam kepada Nabi ﷺ ketika beliau sedang shalat: 'Salam kepada Jibril, salam kepada Mika'il, salam kepada Israfil, salam kepada fulan dan fulan.' Rasulullah ﷺ berpaling kepada mereka dan bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah adalah As-Salam. Apabila salah seorang dari kalian shalat, hendaklah ia mengucapkan: Al-tahiyyatu lillahi was-salawatu wat-tayyibat...' (tasyahud).

662.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad that Abdullah ibn Mas'ud taught them the tashahud in prayer: 'Al-tahiyyatu lillahi was-salawatu wat-tayyibat. As-salamu alayka ayyuhan-nabiyyu wa rahmatullahi wa barakatuh. As-salamu alayna wa ala ibadillahis-salihin. Ashhadu an la ilaha illallah wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan abduhu wa rasuluh.' He said: 'When you complete this, you have completed your prayer. If you wish to stand, stand; if you wish to remain seated, remain seated.'
662.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Qasim ibn Muhammad bahwa Abdullah ibn Mas'ud mengajarkan mereka tasyahud dalam shalat: 'Al-tahiyyatu lillahi was-salawatu wat-tayyibat. As-salamu alayka ayyuhan-nabiyyu wa rahmatullahi wa barakatuh. As-salamu alayna wa ala ibadillahis-salihin. Ashhadu an la ilaha illallah wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan abduhu wa rasuluh.' Beliau berkata: 'Apabila kamu menyelesaikan ini, kamu telah menyelesaikan shalatmu. Jika kamu mau berdiri, berdirilah; jika kamu mau tetap duduk, tetaplah duduk.'

663.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ka'b ibn 'Ujrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Messenger of Allah, we have learned how to greet you, but how do we send blessings upon you?' He said: 'Say: Allahumma salli ala Muhammad wa ala ali Muhammad, kama sallayta ala Ibrahim wa ala ali Ibrahim, innaka hamidun majid. Allahumma barik ala Muhammad wa ala ali Muhammad, kama barakta ala Ibrahim wa ala ali Ibrahim, innaka hamidun majid.'
663.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ka'b ibn 'Ujrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa para sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, kami telah mempelajari cara mengucapkan salam kepadamu, tetapi bagaimana kami bershalawat kepadamu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ucapkanlah: Allahumma salli ala Muhammad wa ala ali Muhammad, kama sallayta ala Ibrahim wa ala ali Ibrahim, innaka hamidun majid. Allahumma barik ala Muhammad wa ala ali Muhammad, kama barakta ala Ibrahim wa ala ali Ibrahim, innaka hamidun majid.'

664.iwh_en: It was narrated from Bashir ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, Allah has commanded us to send blessings upon you; how shall we send blessings upon you?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was silent for a moment, then said: 'Say: Allahumma salli ala Muhammad wa ala ali Muhammad, kama sallayta ala ali Ibrahim; wa barik ala Muhammad wa ala ali Muhammad, kama barakta ala ali Ibrahim fil-alamina, innaka hamidun majid. And the greeting is as you have learned.'
664.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Bashir ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya: 'Wahai Rasulullah, Allah telah memerintahkan kami untuk bershalawat kepadamu; bagaimana kami bershalawat kepadamu?' Rasulullah ﷺ diam sejenak, kemudian bersabda: 'Ucapkanlah: Allahumma salli ala Muhammad wa ala ali Muhammad, kama sallayta ala ali Ibrahim; wa barik ala Muhammad wa ala ali Muhammad, kama barakta ala ali Ibrahim fil-alamina, innaka hamidun majid. Dan salam itu sebagaimana yang telah kalian pelajari.'

665.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When one of you has finished the tashahud, let him seek refuge with Allah from four things: from the punishment of Hell, from the punishment of the grave, from the trials of life and death, and from the trial of al-Masih al-Dajjal.'
665.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian selesai dari tasyahud, hendaklah ia berlindung kepada Allah dari empat hal: dari azab Jahannam, dari azab kubur, dari fitnah hidup dan mati, dan dari fitnah al-Masih al-Dajjal.'

666.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would give the salutation to his right until the whiteness of his cheek was seen, then give salutation to his left until the whiteness of that cheek was seen.
666.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberi salam ke arah kanannya sampai terlihat putih pipinya, kemudian memberi salam ke arah kirinya sampai terlihat putih pipi kirinya.

667.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to give the salutation on two sides: to the right and to the left.
667.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa memberi salam ke dua arah: ke kanan dan ke kiri.

668.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ would not remain seated after the prayer except for the duration it took to say: 'Allahumma antas-salam wa minkas-salam, tabarakta ya dhal-jalali wal-ikram.'
668.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ tidak duduk setelah shalat kecuali seukuran waktu yang digunakan untuk mengucapkan: 'Allahumma antas-salam wa minkas-salam, tabarakta ya dhal-jalali wal-ikram.'

669.iwh_en: It was narrated from Shaddad Abu Ammar that when the Prophet ﷺ wanted to depart from his prayer, he would seek forgiveness three times, then say: 'Allahumma antas-salam wa minkas-salam, tabarakta ya dhal-jalali wal-ikram.'
669.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Shaddad Abu Ammar bahwa Nabi ﷺ ketika hendak meninggalkan shalatnya, beliau beristighfar tiga kali, kemudian mengucapkan: 'Allahumma antas-salam wa minkas-salam, tabarakta ya dhal-jalali wal-ikram.'

670.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Mughirah ibn Shu'bah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say at the end of each prescribed prayer: 'La ilaha illallah wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa ala kulli shay'in qadir. Allahumma la mani'a lima a'tayta, wa la mu'tiya lima mana'ta, wa la yanfa'u dhal-jaddi minkal-jadd.'
670.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Mughirah ibn Shu'bah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengucapkan di akhir setiap shalat fardhu: 'La ilaha illallah wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa ala kulli shay'in qadir. Allahumma la mani'a lima a'tayta, wa la mu'tiya lima mana'ta, wa la yanfa'u dhal-jaddi minkal-jadd.'

671.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Let none of you allot any share of his prayer for the devil, thinking it obligatory upon him not to depart except to his right. I have seen the Prophet ﷺ usually departing to his left.'
671.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Janganlah salah seorang dari kalian mengalokasikan bagian shalatnya untuk setan, dengan menganggap wajib baginya untuk tidak berpaling kecuali ke kanannya. Aku telah melihat Nabi ﷺ lebih sering berpaling ke kirinya.'

672.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ departing to his right.'
672.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ berpaling ke arah kanannya.'

673.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to depart to his right in prayer.
673.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa berpaling ke arah kanannya dalam shalat.

674.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ said to a man: 'Shall I not teach you words that, if you say them, will let you catch up with those who have preceded you, and none who comes after you will overtake you except one who does the same as you? You should say after every prescribed prayer: Subhanallah 33 times, Alhamdulillah 33 times, Allahu Akbar 34 times.'
674.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada seorang laki-laki: 'Tidakkah aku ajarkan kepadamu kalimat-kalimat yang, jika kamu mengucapkannya, akan memungkinkanmu menyamai orang-orang yang telah mendahuluimu, dan tidak ada yang datang setelahmu yang akan melampaumu kecuali orang yang melakukan hal yang sama sepertimu? Hendaklah kamu mengucapkan setelah setiap shalat fardhu: Subhanallah 33 kali, Alhamdulillah 33 kali, Allahu Akbar 34 kali.'

675.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that some poor people came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'The wealthy have taken all the higher ranks and eternal bliss.' He said: 'How is that?' They said: 'They pray as we pray, they fast as we fast, and they give charity from their surplus wealth, while we cannot.' He said: 'Shall I not teach you something by which you can catch up with those who have preceded you and outstrip those who come after you? Say Subhanallah, Alhamdulillah, and Allahu Akbar 33 times each after every prayer.' They came back later and said: 'Our brothers the wealthy have heard what we do and are now doing the same.' He said: 'That is the favor of Allah which He gives to whom He wills.'
675.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa beberapa orang miskin datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Orang-orang kaya telah mengambil semua kedudukan tinggi dan kenikmatan abadi.' Beliau berkata: 'Bagaimana itu?' Mereka berkata: 'Mereka shalat sebagaimana kami shalat, mereka puasa sebagaimana kami puasa, dan mereka bersedekah dari kelebihan harta mereka, sementara kami tidak bisa.' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidakkah aku ajarkan sesuatu yang dengannya kamu bisa menyamai orang-orang yang telah mendahuluimu dan melampaui orang-orang yang datang setelahmu? Ucapkanlah Subhanallah, Alhamdulillah, dan Allahu Akbar masing-masing 33 kali setelah setiap shalat.' Mereka kembali kemudian dan berkata: 'Saudara-saudara kami yang kaya telah mendengar apa yang kami lakukan dan sekarang melakukan hal yang sama.' Beliau bersabda: 'Itulah karunia Allah yang Dia berikan kepada siapa yang Dia kehendaki.'

676.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The first thing a servant will be held accountable for on the Day of Resurrection from his deeds is his prayer. If it is sound, he will have succeeded and prospered; if it is corrupt, he will have failed and lost. If anything is deficient from his obligatory prayers, the Lord will say: Look to see if My servant has any voluntary prayers, so that what was deficient from his obligatory prayers can be completed by them. Then all other deeds will follow in the same way.'
676.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Hal pertama yang akan dimintai pertanggungjawaban dari seorang hamba pada Hari Kebangkitan dari amal-amalnya adalah shalatnya. Jika shalatnya baik, maka dia telah berhasil dan beruntung; jika shalatnya rusak, maka dia telah gagal dan merugi. Jika ada yang kurang dari shalat-shalat wajibnya, Rabb akan berfirman: Lihatlah apakah hamba-Ku memiliki shalat-shalat sunnah, sehingga apa yang kurang dari shalat-shalat wajibnya dapat dilengkapi olehnya. Kemudian semua amal lainnya akan mengikuti dengan cara yang sama.'

677.iwh_en: It was narrated from Muhammad ibn Amr ibn Ata' (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was sitting with a number of the companions of the Prophet ﷺ. We mentioned the prayer of the Prophet ﷺ and Abu Humaid al-Sa'idi said: I am the most knowledgeable among you about the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' He then described the prayer in detail: takbir with both hands raised to the shoulders, ruku with hands on the knees and a straight back, then rising, then going down to the ground and placing the palms by the ears, sitting with the left foot folded and the right foot upright, spreading the toes when prostrating, then completing the final tashahud.
677.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Muhammad ibn Amr ibn Ata' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku duduk bersama sejumlah sahabat Nabi ﷺ. Kami membicarakan shalat Nabi ﷺ dan Abu Humaid al-Sa'idi berkata: Aku adalah orang yang paling mengetahui di antara kalian tentang shalat Rasulullah ﷺ.' Kemudian dia mendeskripsikan shalat secara rinci: takbir dengan mengangkat kedua tangan ke bahu, ruku dengan kedua tangan di atas lutut dan punggung lurus, kemudian bangkit, kemudian turun ke tanah dan meletakkan telapak tangan di dekat telinga, duduk dengan kaki kiri dilipat dan kaki kanan tegak, membuka jari-jari kaki ketika sujud, kemudian menyelesaikan tasyahud akhir.

678.iwh_en: It was narrated from Malik ibn al-Huwayrith (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ praying, and when he was in an odd-numbered rak'ah, he would not rise until he had sat straight.
678.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Malik ibn al-Huwayrith (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melihat Rasulullah ﷺ shalat, dan ketika beliau berada di rakaat ganjil, beliau tidak berdiri sampai beliau duduk lurus.

679.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When you recite Al-Fatiha, say Amin, Allah will answer you. When he says the takbir and bows, say the takbir and bow, for the imam bows before you and rises before you.'
679.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila kalian membaca Al-Fatihah, ucapkanlah Amin, Allah akan mengabulkan kalian. Apabila imam bertakbir dan ruku, bertakbirlah dan rukuklah, karena imam ruku sebelum kalian dan bangkit sebelum kalian.'

680.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to carry Umamah daughter of Zaynab daughter of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while praying. When he prostrated he put her down, and when he stood up he carried her.
680.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menggendong Umamah putri Zaynab putri Rasulullah ﷺ saat shalat. Ketika beliau sujud, beliau menurunkannya, dan ketika beliau berdiri, beliau menggendongnya kembali.

681.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ carried Umamah bint Zaynab bint the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while praying. When he bowed he put her down, and when he rose from prostration he picked her up.
681.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menggendong Umamah binti Zaynab binti Rasulullah ﷺ saat shalat. Ketika beliau ruku, beliau menurunkannya, dan ketika beliau bangkit dari sujud, beliau mengangkatnya kembali.

682.iwh_en: It was narrated from Busr ibn Sa'id (may Allah be pleased with him) that he went to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was praying, and greeted him, and the Prophet returned his greeting with a gesture — he thinks with his finger.
682.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Busr ibn Sa'id (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia pergi ke Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau sedang shalat, dan memberi salam kepadanya, dan Nabi membalas salamnya dengan isyarat — dia mengira dengan jarinya.

683.iwh_en: It was narrated from Suhayb (may Allah be pleased with him) that people greeted him while he was in prayer, and he was asked: How did he reply to them? He said: 'Like this' — and pointed with his hand.
683.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Suhayb (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa orang-orang mengucapkan salam kepadanya sementara ia sedang shalat, dan dia ditanya: Bagaimana dia membalas salam mereka? Dia berkata: 'Seperti ini' — dan menunjuk dengan tangannya.

684.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Glorification (tasbih) is for men and clapping is for women (to signal errors in prayer).'
684.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tasbih adalah untuk laki-laki dan tepuk tangan adalah untuk perempuan (untuk memberi sinyal kesalahan dalam shalat).'

685.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'If something happens to you during your prayer, men should say 'Subhanallah', and women should clap.'
685.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika sesuatu terjadi kepada kalian selama shalat, laki-laki hendaklah mengucapkan 'Subhanallah', dan perempuan hendaklah bertepuk tangan.'

686.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'Pray in your homes, for the best prayer of a person is in his home, except the obligatory prayers (which are in congregation).'
686.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalatlah di rumah-rumah kalian, karena sebaik-baik shalat seseorang adalah di rumahnya, kecuali shalat-shalat wajib (yang dilakukan berjamaah).'

687.iwh_en: It was narrated from two men (may Allah be pleased with them) who came to the Prophet ﷺ, and he asked: 'What prevented you from praying?' They said: 'We have already prayed in our quarters.' He said: 'Do not do that. If you pray in your quarters, then find the imam praying in congregation, pray with him, for that will be counted as a voluntary prayer for you.'
687.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari dua orang laki-laki (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) yang datang kepada Nabi ﷺ, dan beliau bertanya: 'Apa yang menghalangi kalian dari shalat?' Mereka berkata: 'Kami sudah shalat di tempat tinggal kami.' Beliau bersabda: 'Janganlah lakukan itu. Jika kalian shalat di tempat tinggal kalian, kemudian menemukan imam sedang shalat berjamaah, shalatlah bersamanya, karena itu akan dihitung sebagai shalat sunnah bagi kalian.'

688.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ saw a man praying alone and said: 'Is there not a man who will give charity to this person by praying with him?'
688.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melihat seorang laki-laki shalat sendirian dan bersabda: 'Apakah tidak ada seorang laki-laki yang mau bersedekah kepada orang ini dengan shalat bersamanya?'

689.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man came late and the Prophet ﷺ had already completed the prayer. He said: 'Is there not a man who will give charity to this person by praying with him?' A man stood up and prayed with him.
689.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki datang terlambat dan Nabi ﷺ sudah menyelesaikan shalatnya. Beliau bersabda: 'Apakah tidak ada seorang laki-laki yang mau bersedekah kepada orang ini dengan shalat bersamanya?' Seorang laki-laki berdiri dan shalat bersamanya.

690.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'O Messenger of Allah, may a man pray in a single garment?' He said: 'Does every one of you have two garments?'
690.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Wahai Rasulullah, bolehkah seseorang shalat dengan satu pakaian?' Beliau bersabda: 'Apakah setiap orang di antara kalian memiliki dua pakaian?'

691.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'None of you should pray in a single garment with nothing covering his shoulder.'
691.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah salah seorang dari kalian shalat dengan satu pakaian yang tidak ada sesuatu pun yang menutupi bahunya.'

692.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade two ways of wearing a garment: that one of you sit in a single garment with nothing between his private parts and the sky, and the al-samma' wrap — wearing a garment in a way that exposes the right shoulder only.
692.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang dua cara memakai pakaian: seseorang dari kalian duduk dalam satu pakaian dengan tidak ada sesuatu pun antara aurat dan langit, dan cara al-samma' — memakai pakaian dengan cara yang hanya membuka bahu kanan.

693.iwh_en: It was narrated from Maymunah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray on a khumrah (a small prayer mat).
693.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Maymunah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat di atas khumrah (sajadah kecil).

694.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ prayed on a khumrah.
694.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ shalat di atas khumrah.

695.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habibah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked: 'Did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pray in the garment in which he lay with you?' She said: 'Yes, as long as no impurity was visible on it.'
695.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia ditanya: 'Apakah Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dengan pakaian yang beliau gunakan untuk tidur bersamamu?' Dia berkata: 'Ya, selama tidak ada najis yang terlihat padanya.'

696.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the Prophet ﷺ: 'Did the Prophet ﷺ pray in the garment in which he had intercourse with her?' She said: 'Yes, as long as no impurity was visible on it.'
696.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia ditanya tentang Nabi ﷺ: 'Apakah Nabi ﷺ shalat dengan pakaian yang beliau gunakan untuk berhubungan dengannya?' Dia berkata: 'Ya, selama tidak ada najis yang terlihat padanya.'

697.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked: 'Did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pray in his sandals?' He said: 'Yes.'
697.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya: 'Apakah Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dengan menggunakan sandalnya?' Dia berkata: 'Ya.'

698.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was praying with his companions and removed his sandals, placing them on his left side. The companions removed their sandals. When the prayer was finished, he asked: 'What made you take off your sandals?' They said: 'We saw you take yours off so we took ours off.' He said: 'Jibril came to me and informed me there was something impure on them, so I removed them. When one of you goes to the mosque, let him look at his sandals — if he sees something impure on them, let him wipe them on the ground and then pray in them.'
698.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ sedang shalat bersama para sahabatnya dan melepas sandalnya, meletakkannya di sisi kirinya. Para sahabat pun melepas sandal mereka. Ketika shalat selesai, beliau bertanya: 'Apa yang membuat kalian melepas sandal kalian?' Mereka berkata: 'Kami melihat engkau melepasnya, maka kami pun melepasnya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Jibril datang kepadaku dan memberitahuku bahwa ada sesuatu yang najis pada sandalku, maka aku melepasnya. Ketika salah seorang dari kalian pergi ke masjid, hendaklah ia melihat sandalnya — jika ia melihat sesuatu yang najis padanya, hendaklah ia mengusapkannya ke tanah kemudian shalat dengan menggunakannya.'

699.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he disliked al-sadl (letting the garment hang loose over the shoulders) and raised this ruling back to the Prophet ﷺ.
699.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia tidak menyukai al-sadl (membiarkan pakaian menjuntai longgar di atas bahu) dan menisbatkan larangan ini kepada Nabi ﷺ.

700.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ passed by him while he was prostrating with his hair tied up, and the Prophet ﷺ loosened it.
700.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melewatinya ketika ia sedang sujud dengan rambutnya terikat, dan Nabi ﷺ melepaskannya.

701.iwh_en: It was narrated from a man that he was praying with his hair tied behind him, and Ibn Abbas came and stood behind him and began to untie it. The man allowed it. Then he turned to Ibn Abbas and said: 'Why do you interfere with my hair?' He said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: The likeness of such a person is like one who prays with his hands bound (unable to prostrate properly).'
701.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang laki-laki bahwa ia sedang shalat dengan rambutnya terikat di belakang, dan Ibn Abbas datang dan berdiri di belakangnya serta mulai melepaskan ikatannya. Laki-laki itu membiarkannya. Kemudian ia berpaling kepada Ibn Abbas dan berkata: 'Mengapa kamu ikut campur dengan rambutku?' Dia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Perumpamaan orang seperti itu adalah seperti orang yang shalat dalam keadaan tangannya terikat (tidak dapat bersujud dengan benar).'

702.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When one of you yawns, let him cover his mouth with his hand, for the devil enters (if the mouth is left open).'
702.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian menguap, hendaklah ia menutup mulutnya dengan tangannya, karena setan masuk (jika mulut dibiarkan terbuka).'

703.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'If one of you becomes drowsy while praying, let him sleep until his drowsiness passes, for when one prays while drowsy, he may intend to seek forgiveness but instead curse himself.'
703.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika salah seorang dari kalian mengantuk saat shalat, hendaklah ia tidur sampai rasa kantuknya hilang, karena ketika seseorang shalat dalam keadaan mengantuk, ia mungkin bermaksud memohon ampun tetapi justru mendoakan keburukan bagi dirinya sendiri.'

704.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'The prayer of a man sitting is half the prayer (compared to praying standing).'
704.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Amr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat seseorang dalam keadaan duduk adalah setengah dari shalat (dibandingkan dengan shalat berdiri).'

705.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man entered upon the Prophet ﷺ while he was praying seated. He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I have been told that you said the prayer of a man sitting is half the prayer, yet you are praying seated.' He said: 'Yes, but I am not like any of you.' (Meaning: the Prophet's sitting prayer counted fully due to his special status.)
705.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki masuk menemui Nabi ﷺ sementara beliau sedang shalat duduk. Dia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, aku telah diberitahu bahwa engkau bersabda: shalat seseorang dalam keadaan duduk adalah setengah dari shalat, namun engkau sedang shalat duduk.' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, tetapi aku tidak seperti salah seorang dari kalian.' (Maksudnya: shalat duduk Nabi dihitung penuh karena kedudukannya yang istimewa.)

706.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hafsah, wife of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with her), that she said: 'I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pray his voluntary prayers while seated, until he was about a year or two before his death — then he began praying them seated, reciting the surah slowly and deliberately.'
706.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hafsah, istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha), bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ shalat sunnah dalam keadaan duduk, hingga sekitar satu atau dua tahun sebelum kematiannya — kemudian beliau mulai mengerjakan shalat-shalat itu dalam keadaan duduk, membaca surah dengan perlahan dan penuh perhatian.'

707.iwh_en: It was narrated that a man asked the Prophet ﷺ about smoothing the pebbles in the mosque while praying. He said: 'If you must do it, then once only.' Hisham said: 'He meant smoothing the ground with pebbles (during prostration).'
707.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang meratakan kerikil di masjid saat shalat. Beliau bersabda: 'Jika kamu harus melakukannya, maka sekali saja.' Hisyam berkata: 'Beliau maksudkan meratakan tanah dengan kerikil (saat sujud).'

708.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'When one of you stands for prayer, mercy faces him, so let him not smooth the pebbles (by sweeping them away from the place of prostration).'
708.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian berdiri untuk shalat, rahmat menghadapinya, maka janganlah ia meratakan kerikil (dengan menyingkirkannya dari tempat sujud).'

709.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'I was given five things that no prophet before me was given: I was supported with awe at a distance of a month's journey; the earth was made a place of prostration and a means of purification for me; war spoils were made lawful for me while they were not lawful for anyone before me; I was given the intercession; and every prophet was sent specifically to his own people, while I was sent to all of mankind.'
709.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku diberikan lima hal yang tidak diberikan kepada nabi mana pun sebelumku: aku didukung dengan rasa takut (pada musuh) sejauh perjalanan satu bulan; bumi dijadikan tempat sujud dan sarana bersuci bagiku; harta rampasan perang dihalalkan bagiku sementara tidak dihalalkan bagi siapapun sebelumku; aku diberi syafaat; dan setiap nabi diutus khusus kepada kaumnya, sementara aku diutus kepada seluruh umat manusia.'

710.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah  ﷺ said: 'The whole earth has been made a place of prostration for me, except the graveyard and the bathhouse.'
710.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seluruh bumi telah dijadikan tempat sujud bagiku, kecuali kuburan dan tempat mandi umum.'
